title: File column that exports Photos in excel

posts.author: BrendanHarris (Brendan Harris)
posts.cookedHtml:
The file column allows you to capture a photo or upload a photo file - What would be fantastic, and would make Monday a VERY viable “punchlist” or quality control software, is if:
a) The photo thumbnail was larger, and
b) When exported to excel, the photo would fill a cell
